Home.title: Welcome to ClipBattle
Home.subtitle: Upload your best gaming clips and compete against others in battle.
Home.feature1Text: Share your best gaming moments with the community.
Home.feature2Text: Two clips compete against each other — the community decides.
Home.feature3Text: The best clips rise to the top and get noticed.

Upload.title: Upload clip
Upload.subtitle: Upload your best gaming moment and let the community vote in battle.
Upload.alertMissing: Please fill in everything and select a video.
Upload.alertLogin: You need to be logged in.

Feed.title: All clips
Feed.subtitle: Discover the newest and best gaming clips from the community.

Battle.title: Two clips. One decision.
Battle.subtitle: Turn on the sound, watch both clips and vote for the better moment. The winner gets one extra point instantly.
Battle.notEnoughText: Upload at least 2 clips to start a battle.

Leaderboard.title: Top clips
Leaderboard.subtitle: The most successful clips in the community by votes.
Leaderboard.empty: No clips in the leaderboard yet.
Leaderboard.creator: Creator

MyClips.title: My Clips
MyClips.subtitle: Here you can see all clips you uploaded yourself.
MyClips.empty: You haven't uploaded any clips yet.
MyClips.notLoggedInText: Log in to see your own clips.
MyClips.deleteConfirm: Do you really want to delete this clip?

AuthGuard.title: Please log in or register
AuthGuard.subtitle: This page is only available for logged-in users. You can stay on the homepage, but for everything else you need an account.

AuthGuard.title: Please log in or register
AuthGuard.subtitle: This page is only available for logged-in users. You need an account to continue.
